arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski Tottenham injury update issued by Ange Postecoglou as three players left behind
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has confirmed that Dejan Kulusevski is unlikely to be back before the international break due to a foot injury. In the Netherlands to preview Thursday evening's game at AFAS Stadion, Postecoglou provided an injury update and revealed all on Kulusevski .

arts.sum: THE SAMI MOKBEL COLUMN: Arsenal teenager is Ethan Nwaneri is being considered for an England promotion following his brilliant form for Mikel Arteta's side.

arts.ttl: ‘Impossible market dream’ – White flag raised over ambitious hope to sign Tottenham player
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski has arguably been Tottenham Hotspur’s best player in a frustrating season so far. The Swede has ten goals and ten assists in all competitions, and in the Premier League he’s racked up seven goals and four assists. The 24-year-old is heading towards having the best individual season of his career. arts.ttl: “One of best in PL” – Tottenham player’s friend talks up transfer interest, sends hype into stratosphere
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s Yves Bissouma has been in and out of Ange Postecoglou’s playing XI in recent weeks. The Mali international’s contract expires in 2026, and his long-term future at Tottenham is said to be uncertain. arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke sends Spurs reminder after big Ange Postecoglou injury update for AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Although the likes of Wilson Odobert, Guglielmo Vicario and James Maddison have all also returned across recent weeks, Dejan Kulusevski has been added to the injury list . Dominic Solanke has seemingly hinted he's desperate to feature for Tottenham Hotspur against AZ Alkmaar in the Europa League after missing the last seven weeks with a knee injury.
